interpretation: V4 (L=4) improves frozen probe dramatically (15.63 vs 17.81, -2.18 RMSE) but HURTS E2E (16.07 vs 14.23, +1.84). Same pattern as Phase 1c: deeper/longer pretraining helps the encoder produce better fixed representations, but these representations are LESS adaptable under E2E fine-tuning. The V2 (L=2) encoder is a better starting point for E2E because its simpler representations are more malleable.
